text: Once upon a time in a sunflower field, there was a little sunflower named Sam. Sam wasn't as big as the others. Every day he would stare at them. One day his mom lifted him up and put him next to her big bloom. That bloom smiled at him. It spoke. "You're special." Sam turned around. It pointed towards the sky. "Stars." Sam stared. Colors danced. Birds sang. Night fell. Sam curled up. Sleep came easily. Dream? Stars whispered news. A river ran gold through. Find somebody. Adventure. Follow moonlit dewdrops. Wake up. She's waiting. Come here. Forever.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
